summary: Iter 36 — full e2e test of the new Dataset Views feature. Backend 12/12 pytest pass. Frontend smoke covers Datasets page (Views dropdown + Save-as-view + active-view chip + Clear + dropdown pick), /dataset-views page (rows + per-row action testids + Edit dialog + Open-in-Datasets deep link + Run-Eval deep link), and RunEvalModal manual Load-view dropdown + deep-link auto-load. All expected testids present and integrations work as specified.
critical_code_review_comments: isAuthor branch in DatasetViewsPage.js (line 128) correctly hides edit/delete for non-authors based on created_by_email === currentEmail; positive-case verified in UI, negative-case verified via code review per request.

DatasetsPage view-load fetch caps at limit=200 (harness max) — acceptable for the current 89-row corpus but if dataset corpus grows beyond 200, view items may silently fail to highlight. Worth noting for future.
seed_data_creation: Created a transient view 'pw e2e view 1782397643' (2 bug_bench items) during the run and deleted it on teardown. Pre-existing 'e2e smoke view' was left intact.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file /app/backend/tests/test_dataset_views.py is the regression suite for the views CRUD endpoints (12 tests, ~1.5s). For UI re-tests, seed acm_session_token = pw_emergent_gate_post and use existing 'e2e smoke view'. All required data-testids: datasets-views-dropdown, datasets-save-view-btn, select-row-<iid>, save-view-dialog/name-input/description-input/confirm-btn, active-view-chip, active-view-clear-btn, view-pick-<id>, dataset-views-page, view-row-<id>, view-open-datasets-<id>, view-run-eval-<id>, view-edit-<id>, view-delete-<id>, view-edit-dialog/name-input/description-input/save-btn/cancel-btn, view-delete-dialog/confirm-btn, eval-load-view-btn, eval-active-view-chip. All confirmed present and wired.
